description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Debian that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: build and multiarch. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, uses a matrix strategy with gcc and clang compilers, and performs a release or daily build using the addnab/docker-run-action. The multiarch job also runs on ubuntu-latest, uses a matrix strategy with different architectures and compilers, and performs a release or daily build using the uraimo/run-on-arch-action.
